mapper.sql: o.id, o.order_no, o.buyer_id, buyer.nickname AS buyer_nickname, o.seller_id, seller.nickname AS seller_nickname, o.product_id, p.title AS product_title, p.image AS product_image, o.address_id, a.receiver_name, a.receiver_phone, CONCAT(a.province, a.city, a.district, a.detail_address) AS full_address, o.quantity, o.subtotal_price, o.tax_estimated_amount, o.shipping_fee_snapshot, o.total_price, o.payment_currency_snapshot, o.international_shipping_fee_snapshot, o.insurance_fee_snapshot, o.tariff_amount_snapshot, o.vat_amount_snapshot, o.consumption_tax_amount_snapshot, o.tax_mode_snapshot, o.origin_zone_snapshot, o.tax_rate_snapshot, o.exchange_rate_snapshot, o.tax_included_flag, o.customs_clearance_status, o.status, o.tracking_number, o.crossborder_tracking_number, o.domestic_tracking_number, o.tax_declaration_accepted, o.restricted_declaration_accepted, o.audit_status, o.audit_remark, o.audit_time, o.remark, o.payment_proof, o.payment_time, o.payment_status, o.payment_channel, o.payment_submitted_time, o.payment_verified_time, o.refund_status, o.refund_amount, o.refund_time, o.create_time, o.update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM `order` o LEFT JOIN user buyer ON o.buyer_id = buyer.id LEFT JOIN user seller ON o.seller_id = seller.id LEFT JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN address a ON o.address_id = a.id WHERE o.id = #{id} AND o.deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) AS order_count, COALESCE(SUM(o.total_price), 0) AS order_amount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.status IN ('PURCHASING', 'PURCHASED', 'INTL_SHIPPING', 'CUSTOMS_CLEARANCE', 'WAREHOUSE_INSPECTION', 'DOMESTIC_SHIPPING') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS active_fulfillment_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.status IN ('INTL_SHIPPING', 'CUSTOMS_CLEARANCE', 'WAREHOUSE_INSPECTION') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS customs_pending_count FROM `order` o WHERE o.deleted = 0
AND o.create_time >= #{startTime}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS order_count, COALESCE(SUM(o.total_price), 0) AS order_amount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 'PENDING_SHIPMENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pending_shipment_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.status IN ('PURCHASING', 'PURCHASED', 'INTL_SHIPPING', 'CUSTOMS_CLEARANCE', 'WAREHOUSE_INSPECTION', 'DOMESTIC_SHIPPING') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS active_fulfillment_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.status IN ('INTL_SHIPPING', 'CUSTOMS_CLEARANCE', 'WAREHOUSE_INSPECTION') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS customs_pending_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.refund_status IS NOT NULL AND o.refund_status != '' AND o.refund_status != 'NONE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS refund_order_count FROM `order` o WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND o.seller_id = #{sellerId}
AND o.create_time >= #{startTime}
